title: Fix Vera name bug and warthog hop/jump

log.context: Fix Vera name bug and warthog hop/jump

Both services are restarted and running. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**Bug 1 — All walkers named "Vera" (`/mnt/data/persona-audition/src/index.ts`)**

The `GENERATION_PROMPT` constant was evaluated once at module load, so the seed was static for the process lifetime (and LLM caching likely returned the same response). Fixed by:
- Renaming to `GENERATION_PROMPT_BASE`
- Adding a `getGenerationPrompt()` function that appends a fresh `Math.random()` seed each time it's called
- Updated bo...(truncated)
